title: 你有什么爱好？
pinyin: Nǐ yǒu shén me ài hào?
description_uz: «Qanday sevimli mashg'ulotlaring bor?» — hobbi haqida ikki do'stning suhbati. Bu dialog sevimli mashg'ulotni so'rash, qancha vaqtdan beri shug'ullanishini, uni o'rganish qiyinligini aytish va o'zaro almashishni mashq qiladi. Kundalik, foydali so'zlar bilan — takrorlab o'rganish uchun ideal.
description_ru: «Какие у тебя увлечения?» — разговор двух друзей о хобби. Диалог тренирует, как спросить об увлечениях, как долго человек ими занимается, трудно ли этому учиться, и обменяться интересами. Близкая тема и полезная лексика — идеально для повторения.
description_en: «What are your hobbies?» — a chat between two friends about hobbies. This dialogue practices asking about hobbies, how long someone has done them, whether they're hard to learn, and swapping interests. Relatable topic with useful vocabulary—perfect for repetition.

sentences.pinyin: Nǐ yǒu shén me ài hào?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Wǒ xǐ huan zuò fàn hé huà huà.
sentences.text_translation: Men ovqat pishirish va rasm chizishni yoqtiraman.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Nǐ zuò fàn zuò de hǎo ma?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 还可以，我每个周末都做。
sentences.pinyin: Hái kě yǐ, wǒ měi ge zhōu mò dōu zuò.
sentences.text_translation: Yomon emas, har hafta oxiri pishiraman.
sentences.text_translation_en: Not bad — I cook every weekend.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Nǐ huà huà huà le duō jiǔ le?
sentences.text_translation_en: How long have you been drawing?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Wǒ huà le liǎng nián le.
sentences.text_translation_en: I've been drawing for two years.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 开始有点难，现在好多了。
sentences.pinyin: Kāi shǐ yǒu diǎn nán, xiàn zài hǎo duō le.
sentences.text_translation: Boshida biroz qiyin edi, hozir ancha yaxshi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Сначала было трудновато, сейчас намного лучше.
sentences.text_translation_en: At first it was a bit hard, now it's much better.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Tīng qǐ lai hěn yǒu yì si.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Nǐ ne? Nǐ yǒu shén me ài hào?
sentences.text_translation: Sen-chi? Sening qanday sevimli mashg'ulotlaring bor?
sentences.text_translation_ru: А ты? Какие у тебя увлечения?
sentences.text_translation_en: And you? What are your hobbies?
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 看书很好，可以学很多东西。
sentences.pinyin: Kàn shū hěn hǎo, kě yǐ xué hěn duō dōng xi.
sentences.text_translation: Kitob o'qish juda yaxshi, ko'p narsa o'rganish mumkin.
sentences.text_translation_en: Reading is great — you can learn a lot.
sentences.speaker: B
